hero.name: Mohanad Mohammed Mostafa
hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.description: Frontend Developer skilled in Angular, React, and React Native with strong HTML/CSS/JavaScript/TypeScript expertise. Turning ideas into pixel-perfect interfaces from scratch and delivering cross-platform solutions like web dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and mobile apps.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Frontend Developer
about.description: Frontend Developer skilled in Angular, React, and React Native with strong HTML/CSS/JavaScript/TypeScript expertise. Turning ideas into pixel-perfect interfaces from scratch and delivering cross-platform solutions like web dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and mobile apps.
about.name: Name:

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical Expertise
skills.description1: With a strong foundation in web technologies and a passion for clean, efficient code, I've developed expertise in a range of tools and frameworks that allow me to build performant, accessible, and beautiful web applications—while keeping the UI architecture maintainable, scalable, and easy to extend.
skills.description2: I'm constantly learning and experimenting with new technologies to stay ahead of industry trends and deliver cutting-edge solutions to complex problems, whether it's crafting modern UI patterns, improving performance, or strengthening accessibility.

uiEvolution.title: Graduation Project: UI Generator (UI Evolution) - Grade: A+
uiEvolution.description: Developed complete frontend interface for an AI-powered UI automation system using Angular, Bootstrap, and 3D JavaScript with user authentication and dynamic visual components. Led frontend architecture decisions ensuring seamless integration with backend AI services and a fully responsive, enhanced user experience.

nileMart.title: E-Commerce (Nile-Mart)
nileMart.description: Built a fully responsive Angular e-commerce application using TypeScript and LocalStorage with user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and favorites. Integrated search/filter functionality and profile management with a modern design and optimized user experience.

superMart.title: Super-Mart (Supermarket System)
superMart.description: Built a responsive Angular supermarket website with TypeScript and LocalStorage featuring user shopping interface, offers browsing, and full administrative controls. Delivered a complete supermarket management system with a clean, modern UI and seamless navigation across all user and admin flows.

mshSuits.title: MSH Suits (Women's Suits E-Commerce)
mshSuits.description: Built a comprehensive full-stack e-commerce platform with Angular 20 frontend and Node.js backend, featuring JWT authentication, multi-language support, dark/light theme, and shopping cart with order management. Built a comprehensive admin dashboard for managing orders, products, and promo codes with full CRUD operations, RxJS state management, and optimized image handling.

lutonEngineering.title: Luton Engineering – Web Dashboard & Mobile App (Ghana) - Oct 2025
lutonEngineering.description: Built a full React web dashboard for a Ghanaian engineering company featuring authentication, roles & permissions system, complete warehouse and order management, and inter-warehouse transfers, alongside a modern, high-end landing page. Developed a React Native Expo mobile application mirroring the full dashboard experience for selected internal users, enabling on-the-go company management.

homeInformationSystems.title: Home Information Systems – Web Dashboard (UK) - Dec 2025
homeInformationSystems.description: Developed a comprehensive React web dashboard for a UK-based company featuring authentication, roles & permissions system, and full management of warehouses, products, product categories, companies, and clients. Delivered a scalable, detail-oriented admin system covering every operational aspect of the business with a clean and intuitive UI.

myMuslimHeroes.title: My Muslim Heroes – Islamic Quiz Mobile App & Admin Dashboard - Jun 2026
myMuslimHeroes.description: Built a React Native mobile application featuring authentication, Islamic quizzes, games, and multi-level challenges with a points-based competitive system that unlocks progressively harder levels, alongside an educational mode to enhance Islamic knowledge. Developed a React web admin dashboard for full content control, managing all quizzes, stories, and app content to ensure everything stays within the app's Islamic guidelines.

adaplo.description: Developing and maintaining responsive web and mobile applications using React and React Native with Expo framework
achievements: Implementing modern UI/UX designs with TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality frontend solutions

saiket.description: Completed a one-month frontend internship focused on real-world UI challenges, developing and delivering 6 diverse frontend tasks within set deadlines
achievements: Applied HTML, CSS, and JavaScript skills to practical projects
Maintained strong attention to detail in responsive design implementation

zagazig.institution: Faculty of Computers and Information, Zagazig University
highlights: Fresh graduate from Computer Science program
Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, C++, and Object-Oriented Programming
